requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (NS / CISPR 14 series, ASN)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（NS / CISPR 14系列，ASN）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（NS / CISPR 14系列，ASN）

summary.en: Senegal does not operate an EU-style standalone EMC directive. Where EMC requirements apply to household appliances, the technical baseline follows the international CISPR 14 series （CISPR 14-1 emission; CISPR 14-2 immunity）, which ASN adopts as NS in line with its practice of adopting IEC/CISPR international standards. Radio/telecom emitting equipment （e.g. refrigerators with Wi-Fi or Bluetooth connectivity） falls under the radio regulator ARTP （Autorite de Regulation des Telecommunications et des Postes）, which may require type approval/homologation for the radio module. For a standard non-connected household refrigerator, EMC is generally addressed as part of the appliance's IEC-based conformity （CISPR 14 series） within the import conformity-assessment process （PEC/VoC） rather than via a dedicated EMC mark. Test evidence is typically a recognised laboratory report against the CISPR 14 series.
summary.zh: 塞内加尔不实行欧盟式的独立电磁兼容指令。在电磁兼容要求适用于家用器具的情形下，技术基准遵循国际CISPR 14系列（CISPR 14-1发射；CISPR 14-2抗扰度），ASN依其采纳IEC/CISPR国际标准的惯例将其采纳为NS。具备无线电/电信发射功能的设备（如带Wi-Fi或蓝牙连接的电冰箱）受无线电监管机构ARTP（电信与邮政监管局）管辖，可能须对无线模块进行型式核准/入网认证。对于标准的非联网家用电冰箱，电磁兼容通常作为器具基于IEC的合格性（CISPR 14系列）的一部分，在进口合格评定流程（PEC/VoC）中处理，而非通过专门的电磁兼容标志。检测证据通常为依据CISPR 14系列出具的被认可实验室报告。
summary.zht: 塞內加爾不實行歐盟式的獨立電磁相容指令。在電磁相容要求適用於家用器具的情形下，技術基準遵循國際CISPR 14系列（CISPR 14-1發射；CISPR 14-2抗擾度），ASN依其採納IEC/CISPR國際標準的慣例將其採納為NS。具備無線電/電信發射功能的設備（如帶Wi-Fi或藍牙連接的電冰箱）受無線電監管機構ARTP（電信與郵政監管局）管轄，可能須對無線模組進行型式核准/入網認證。對於標準的非聯網家用電冰箱，電磁相容通常作為器具基於IEC的合格性（CISPR 14系列）的一部分，在進口合格評定流程（PEC/VoC）中處理，而非通過專門的電磁相容標誌。檢測證據通常為依據CISPR 14系列出具的被認可實驗室報告。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (adopted as NS by ASN)
CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (adopted as NS by ASN)
ARTP (Autorite de Regulation des Telecommunications et des Postes) — radio/telecom type approval for connected appliances with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth modules

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances （including refrigerators） are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 （Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016） and GB/T 4343.2-2020 （Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015）. Harmonic emissions are addressed by GB 17625.1-2022 （mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020）. These are enforced under the CCC regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both GB 4343.1 and the Senegalese NS baseline trace to the CISPR 14 series, the underlying emission/immunity technical content is closely aligned, though the Chinese CCC EMC test report is a domestic-regime document.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）适用。上述标准在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC制度下执行。由于GB 4343.1与塞内加尔NS基准均源自CISPR 14系列，底层发射/抗扰度技术内容高度一致，但中国CCC电磁兼容检测报告为国内制度文件。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）適用。上述標準在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC制度下執行。由於GB 4343.1與塞內加爾NS基準均源自CISPR 14系列，底層發射/抗擾度技術內容高度一致，但中國CCC電磁相容檢測報告為國內制度文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions ≤ 16 A/phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Senegal has no EU-style standalone EMC directive, so there is no separate EMC mark to obtain — but two points matter: (1) Conformity evidence — where the import conformity process （PEC/VoC） requires EMC demonstration, a recognised laboratory report to the CISPR 14 series is the practical document; the Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC report, although built on CISPR 14-1, is a domestic-regime document and a recognised CISPR 14 report （e.g. via an ILAC/IECEE-accepted laboratory） is preferable for re-use. Because both regimes trace to CISPR 14, the technical re-use burden is low. (2) Connected models — refrigerators with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth modules trigger ARTP radio type approval/homologation, which is a separate radio-regulator step with no Chinese-domestic equivalent for the Senegal market; the radio module's international （e.g. IEC/ETSI-based） test evidence and ARTP approval must be secured. Confirm the specific EMC documentation expected by the PEC/VoC conformity-assessment body for the product category.
gap.zh: 塞内加尔无欧盟式的独立电磁兼容指令，因此无须取得单独的电磁兼容标志——但有两点须注意：（1）合格证据——在进口合格评定流程（PEC/VoC）要求电磁兼容证明的情形下，依据CISPR 14系列出具的被认可实验室报告为切实可行的文件；中国GB 4343.1 CCC报告虽基于CISPR 14-1，但为国内制度文件，被认可的CISPR 14报告（如经ILAC/IECEE接受的实验室出具）更便于复用。由于两套制度均源自CISPR 14，技术复用负担较低。（2）联网型号——带Wi-Fi/蓝牙模块的电冰箱触发ARTP无线电型式核准/入网认证，这是单独的无线电监管步骤，对塞内加尔市场而言无中国国内等效；须取得无线模块的国际（如基于IEC/ETSI）检测证据及ARTP核准。须确认PEC/VoC合格评定机构对该产品类别所期望的具体电磁兼容文件。
gap.zht: 塞內加爾無歐盟式的獨立電磁相容指令，因此無須取得單獨的電磁相容標誌——但有兩點須注意：（1）合格證據——在進口合格評定流程（PEC/VoC）要求電磁相容證明的情形下，依據CISPR 14系列出具的被認可實驗室報告為切實可行的文件；中國GB 4343.1 CCC報告雖基於CISPR 14-1，但為國內制度文件，被認可的CISPR 14報告（如經ILAC/IECEE接受的實驗室出具）更便於複用。由於兩套制度均源自CISPR 14，技術複用負擔較低。（2）聯網型號——帶Wi-Fi/藍牙模組的電冰箱觸發ARTP無線電型式核准/入網認證，這是單獨的無線電監管步驟，對塞內加爾市場而言無中國國內等效；須取得無線模組的國際（如基於IEC/ETSI）檢測證據及ARTP核准。須確認PEC/VoC合格評定機構對該產品類別所期望的具體電磁相容文件。

mandatory_status.target: No standalone EMC mark — EMC to CISPR 14 series (NS) addressed within the import conformity process where required; connected (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) models require separate ARTP radio type approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: ARTP (Autorite de Regulation des Telecommunications et des Postes) / ASN

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Senegal has no EU-style standalone EMC directive; the EMC baseline for appliances is the CISPR 14 series adopted as NS by ASN, addressed within the import conformity process (PEC/VoC) where required. Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC data is built on CISPR 14-1 so the technical gap is small, but a recognised CISPR 14 report eases re-use. Connected refrigerators (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) require separate ARTP radio type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塞内加尔无欧盟式的独立电磁兼容指令；器具的电磁兼容基准为ASN采纳为NS的CISPR 14系列，在要求时于进口合格评定流程（PEC/VoC）中处理。中国GB 4343.1 CCC数据建立在CISPR 14-1之上，故技术差距较小，但被认可的CISPR 14报告更便于复用。联网电冰箱（Wi-Fi/蓝牙）须另行取得ARTP无线电型式核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塞內加爾無歐盟式的獨立電磁相容指令；器具的電磁相容基準為ASN採納為NS的CISPR 14系列，在要求時於進口合格評定流程（PEC/VoC）中處理。中國GB 4343.1 CCC數據建立在CISPR 14-1之上，故技術差距較小，但被認可的CISPR 14報告更便於複用。聯網電冰箱（Wi-Fi/藍牙）須另行取得ARTP無線電型式核准。
